description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a large front porch supported by columns. The exterior features a combination of light-colored siding and darker roof shingles, with multiple symmetrically arranged windows on both floors. The property is landscaped with several mature trees, shrubs, and a manicured lawn, and is bordered by a white picket fence. A wide driveway leads to a double garage on the right side of the house, while the backyard includes a swimming pool and patio area. The main entrance is accentuated by steps, a covered porch, and decorative railings. The overall design is reminiscent of American Craftsman or Colonial Revival styles, blending traditional and modern elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, front porch, double garage, and landscaped yard with trees and a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide porch with columns, double garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage doors, picket fence, and backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by large trees, with glimpses of the back of the house and upper windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and additional landscaping, with the driveway visible on the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, steps, decorative railings, and a central door
